monitor_the_situation.title: US Strikes Iran; Iran Retaliates Against Gulf States, US Bases in Persian Gulf
— S4 · Conflict · Persian Gulf · 1d ago. Iran has reportedly launched attacks targeting Bahrain and Kuwait in the Persian Gulf, escalating regional tensions.
US Expands Airstrikes Across Southern Iran After Ceasefire Collapses
Iran Strikes US Bases in Kuwait, Bahrain, and Qatar With Missiles and Drones
Iran Strikes US Bases in Bahrain, Kuwait, and Qatar with Missiles and Drones

— S4 · Conflict · Manama, Bahrain · 2d ago. Iran has launched drone strikes against Bahrain, targeting the U.S. Fifth Fleet Headquarters, in retaliation for recent U.S. strikes on Iranian military infrastructure.
